title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents a video exploring how logarithmic transformations from complex analysis can be applied to images, using Escher's Print Gallery as a case study. The video explains conformal maps, complex exponentials and logarithms, and demonstrates the mathematical principles underlying the visual distortions in Escher's artwork.
